arguments.reasoning: Line 33: `pop_back()` removes the most recently used item (back of deque = most recent). LRU should evict from the front (least recently used). Should be `pop_front()`.

arguments.summary: Fixed LRU eviction in src/cache/lru.rs:33 — changed pop_back() to pop_front(). VecDeque back = most recent, front = least recent. Was evicting MRU instead of LRU. One-word fix. All 4 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed LRU cache eviction in src/cache/lru.rs. Changed pop_back() to pop_front() on the order deque so the least recently used item is evicted, not the most recent. All 4 tests pass.
